Bioscratch Plain Text Fixture
==============================

This file has a .txt extension and should be displayed as plain text
with no Markdown rendering. Lines that look like headings or bold text
are shown as-is, not formatted:

# This is not a heading
**This is not bold**
- This is not a list item

The editor shows a monospace code block view with no syntax highlighting
and no special treatment of Markdown syntax.

Some typical plain text content:

  Name:    Bioscratch
  Version: 0.1.0
  License: MIT

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod
tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim
veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea
commodo consequat.

--- end of file ---
